title: ononis natrix proles hispanica
intro: Ononis natrix proles hispanica, also known as Spanish restharrow, is a plant species within the legume family, characterized by its spiny stems and clusters of yellow flowers. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Spanish restharrow include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Herbal preparations of Spanish restharrow often involve infusions or tinctures made from its roots and leaves, which can be used externally for topical applications or internally as a supplement.
